# Transcrição: 22. AFFORDABILITY CLOSE - MAKE MY UVING MAKING IT AFFORDABLE

- **Fonte:** 22. AFFORDABILITY CLOSE - MAKE MY UVING MAKING IT AFFORDABLE
- **Duração:** 00:18

---

## [00:00 - 00:18]

You're in the clothes and here I don't think I can afford to do this. Sir, I make my living making things affordable. That means I'm in your employ. Allow me to work out the figures for you. If they don't fit then you can either fire me or you can tell me what it is that we need to do to make you a happy owner. Fair enough.
